# @pump-fun/agent-payments-sdk

TypeScript SDK for Pump Agent Payments. Owned by [@pump-fun](https://github.com/pump-fun), published as a restricted (private) npm package.

## Install

```bash
npm install @pump-fun/agent-payments-sdk
```

## Build

```bash
npm ci
npm run build
```

## Release

Releases are done via the [Release SDK](../../.github/workflows/release-sdk.yml) workflow (manual dispatch). Ensure `SECURITY_BATON_NPMJS_PUBLISH_TOKEN` is set in the repository secrets.
